action.reasoning: Observation: After 8 iterations, still no baseline mIoU due to repeated DDP/DataParallel crashes (OOM, SIGABRT) with SegFormer B5. Training curves show loss decreasing but process killed. Analysis: SegFormer B5 is too memory-heavy or unstable under multi-GPU training in this environment. Need a simpler, lighter model to get a working pipeline and baseline score. Decision: Switch to DeepLabV3 with ResNet50 backbone (pre-downloaded, lightweight). Use single-GPU training to eliminate multi-GPU bugs. Train 5 epochs, validate, save best checkpoint, submit eval. Also rewrite predict.py for robust multi-GPU inference.
